expectedVerification: controller validation rejects the report (schema / unit-id / outcome failure)
commitExpectation: no commit; the report is preserved as evidence and the unit is recorded blocked/failed
forbidden: accepting a report that fails implementation-report.mjs validate
silently editing the report to pass
stop_condition: implementation-report.mjs validate exits non-zero; the controller does not commit, preserves the report, and records a blocked/failed attempt
human_checks: confirm the report file was preserved unchanged
